controls.title: Sovereign branch policy is explicit and consistent

execution.command: grep -Eq '^- Canonical operational and audit branch: `main`' README.md && grep -Eq '^- `master` is frozen' README.md && grep -Eq '^- `main` is the only canonical branch' CONTRIBUTING.md

controls.title: PR governance checklist enforces target branch and checks

execution.command: grep -q 'Base branch is `main`' .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md && grep -q 'Constitutional check `production-distributed-ready-final` passed' .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md && grep -q 'Release discipline check `release-grade-discipline-gate` passed' .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

controls.title: Constitutional gate workflow runs on PRs targeting main

execution.command: grep -q '^name: Production Distributed Ready Final' .github/workflows/production-distributed-ready-final.yml && grep -Eq '^\s+pull_request:' .github/workflows/production-distributed-ready-final.yml && grep -Eq '^\s+- main$' .github/workflows/production-distributed-ready-final.yml && grep -Eq '^\s+workflow_dispatch:' .github/workflows/production-distributed-ready-final.yml

controls.title: Periodic official audit keeps strict signature enforcement

execution.command: grep -q 'echo "PASS"' assurance/signers/mldsa_verify.sh && grep -q 'echo "FAIL"' assurance/signers/mldsa_verify.sh && grep -q '^exit 1$' assurance/signers/mldsa_verify.sh

controls.title: Strict freeze mode can enforce clean working tree
Constitutional MUST controls remain fail-closed by policy

execution.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('config/constitutional_controls.v1.json', encoding='utf-8')); assert all(c.get('failureBehavior')=='FAIL_CLOSED' for c in d.get('controls', []) if str(c.get('normative','')).upper()=='MUST')"

controls.title: Release discipline policy and final checklist are versioned
Release discipline gate workflow is present and wired to verifier

execution.command: grep -q '^name: Release Grade Discipline Gate' .github/workflows/release-grade-discipline-gate.yml && grep -Eq '^\s+pull_request:' .github/workflows/release-grade-discipline-gate.yml && grep -Eq '^\s+- main$' .github/workflows/release-grade-discipline-gate.yml && grep -q 'verify_release_discipline.sh' .github/workflows/release-grade-discipline-gate.yml

controls.title: Release readiness check artifact is generated
